name: Corporate Header
description: Clean corporate header with logo and navigation
html:
{{logo}}
    {{#each navLinks}}
  • {{label}}
    • {{/each}}
{{ctaText}}
css: .header { padding: 1rem 0; background: #fff; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .header-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .logo a { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1e3a5f; text-decoration: none; } .nav-links { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 2rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .nav-links a { color: #4a5568; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.2s; } .nav-links a:hover { color: #1e3a5f; } .btn-primary { background: #1e3a5f; color: #fff; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .nav { display: none; } .header-inner { gap: 1rem; } }

name: Corporate Hero
description: Full-width hero section with headline and call-to-action
html:
{{title}}

{{subtitle}}

{{ctaPrimary}}{{ctaSecondary}}
css: .hero { padding: 6rem 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e3a5f 0%, #2c5282 100%); color: #fff; } .hero-content { max-width: 700px; } .hero-title { font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .hero-subtitle { font-size: 1.25rem; opacity: 0.9; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; line-height: 1.6; } .hero-actions { display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; } .btn-lg { padding: 1rem 2rem; font-size: 1.125rem; } .btn-primary { background: #d69e2e; color: #1a202c; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; display: inline-block; } .btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #fff; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); border-radius: 0.5rem; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; display: inline-block; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .hero { padding: 4rem 0; } .hero-title { font-size: 2.25rem; } .hero-subtitle { font-size: 1.1rem; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .hero-title { font-size: 1.75rem; } .hero-actions { flex-direction: column; } }

subtitle.default: We deliver strategic solutions that transform organizations, accelerate growth, and create lasting competitive advantages in an ever-evolving marketplace.

name: Services Grid
description: Grid layout showcasing core business services
html:
{{title}}

{{description}}

{{#each services}}
{{icon}}

{{title}}

{{description}}

Learn more →
{{/each}}
css: .services { padding: 5rem 0; background: #f7fafc; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1e3a5f; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .section-desc { font-size: 1.125rem; color: #718096; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; } .services-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 2rem; } .service-card { background: #fff; padding: 2rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .service-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .service-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .service-title { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1a202c; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .service-desc { color: #718096; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; } .service-link { color: #2c5282; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .section-title { font-size: 2rem; } }

description.default: Comprehensive solutions tailored to your business needs

default.title: Strategic Planning
default.description: Data-driven strategies that align with your business objectives and market opportunities.

default.title: Business Consulting
default.description: Expert guidance to optimize operations, reduce costs, and drive sustainable growth.

default.title: Digital Transformation
default.description: Modernize your technology stack and embrace digital-first business processes.

default.title: Talent Management
default.description: Build high-performing teams with our recruitment and development solutions.

default.title: Financial Advisory
default.description: Navigate complex financial landscapes with expert analysis and planning.

default.title: Global Expansion
default.description: Scale your business internationally with market entry strategies and local partnerships.

name: Corporate Stats
html:
{{#each stats}}
{{number}}
{{label}}
{{/each}}
css: .stats { padding: 4rem 0; background: #1e3a5f; color: #fff; } .stats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 2rem; text-align: center; } .stat-number { font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 800; color: #d69e2e; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .stat-label { font-size: 1rem; opacity: 0.85; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .stats-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .stats-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; } .stat-number { font-size: 2.25rem; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .stats-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

name: Corporate Testimonials
html:
{{title}}

{{#each testimonials}}
"{{text}}"
{{name}}{{role}}
{{/each}}
css: .testimonials { padding: 5rem 0; background: #fff; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1e3a5f; } .testimonials-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 2rem; } .testimonial-card { background: #f7fafc; padding: 2rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border-left: 4px solid #d69e2e; } .testimonial-text { font-size: 1rem; color: #4a5568; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-style: italic; } .author-name { color: #1e3a5f; display: block; } .author-role { color: #718096; font-size: 0.875rem; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .testimonials-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .testimonials-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .section-title { font-size: 2rem; } }

name: Corporate CTA
description: Prominent call-to-action banner for lead generation
html:
{{title}}

{{description}}

{{buttonText}}
css: .cta { padding: 5rem 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2c5282 0%, #1e3a5f 100%); color: #fff; } .cta-content { text-align: center; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; } .cta-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .cta-desc { font-size: 1.125rem; opacity: 0.9; margin-bottom: 2rem; } .btn-primary { background: #d69e2e; color: #1a202c; padding: 1rem 2rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; display: inline-block; font-size: 1.125rem; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .cta { padding: 3rem 0; } .cta-title { font-size: 2rem; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .cta-title { font-size: 1.5rem; } }

description.default: Schedule a free consultation with our experts and discover how we can help you achieve your goals.

name: Corporate Contact Form
html:
{{title}}

{{#each fields}}
{{#if type='textarea'}}{{else}}{{/if}}
{{/each}}
css: .contact-form { padding: 5rem 0; background: #f7fafc; } .form-wrapper { max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; background: #fff; padding: 2.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .form-title { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1e3a5f; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; text-align: center; } .form-group { margin-bottom: 1.25rem; } .form-label { display: block; font-weight: 500; color: #4a5568; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .form-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 1rem; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .form-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #2c5282; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(44,82,130,0.1); } textarea.form-input { min-height: 120px; resize: vertical; } .btn-block { width: 100%; text-align: center; border: none; cursor: pointer; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .form-wrapper { padding: 1.5rem; } }

name: Corporate Footer
description: Comprehensive corporate footer with links and information
html:
{{logo}}

{{description}}

{{#each columns}}

{{title}}

    {{#each links}}
  • {{label}}
    • {{/each}}
{{/each}}

{{copyright}}
css: .footer { padding: 4rem 0 2rem; background: #1a202c; color: #a0aec0; } .footer-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 3rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .footer-logo { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .footer-desc { line-height: 1.6; } .footer-col-title { color: #fff; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .footer-links { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; } .footer-links li { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .footer-links a { color: #a0aec0; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .footer-links a:hover { color: #d69e2e; } .footer-bottom { border-top: 1px solid #4a5568; padding-top: 2rem; text-align: center; } .copyright { font-size: 0.875rem; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; } }

description.default: Delivering strategic solutions that transform businesses and drive sustainable growth since 2009.
